_comment:
RC stick-centre trim capture. Faster sibling of the full RC calibration: operator centres every stick on the transmitter, the autopilot snapshots the resulting PWM values as the new trim baseline. No min / max sweep; only centre.

Both recoverable failure kinds resolve to `connectExternalSensor` — same context as `recipe.fleet.calibrate.rc`: 'verify the RC receiver is connected and the transmitter is on, sticks centred.'

Overall budget is 60s — procedure is seconds; budget covers operator setup of transmitter.

then.detail: RC trim calibration cancelled by operator.
RC trim calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
